codeReview.summary: The prior blocking issue is resolved: current HEAD patches token pools with live catalog data before aggregating optional token-price fields, and the added route test proves live-derived market cap, 24h volume, and reserve values when live DeFiLlama pricing/pool data succeeds. I did not find new feature-scoped blocking issues in the reviewed fix path.

sharedStateObservations.observation: The onchain-api-worker skill still treats commit-only sessions as a procedure deviation because it requires writing failing tests first even when the assigned feature explicitly says the implementation already exists in the working tree and the task is to verify/commit it.
sharedStateObservations.evidence: /home/whoami/dev/openGecko/.factory/skills/onchain-api-worker/SKILL.md step 4 vs handoff /home/whoami/.factory/missions/f3507a1f-9e14-4c7c-a7d4-636d4909f2b3/handoffs/2026-03-27T03-57-23-612Z__wire-onchain-trades-ohlcv-prices-live__fdaeb825-db1b-4001-87e1-2a1b2624163d.json and prior review note the worker had to mark this as a deviation for a commit-only assignment.

summary: Pass: the previous failure is fixed at current HEAD. Commit ed1c60a updates fetchLiveSimpleTokenPrice to aggregate optional fields from live-patched pool data and adds a targeted assertion proving the endpoint now returns live-backed aggregate fields instead of seeded-only values when live pricing succeeds.
